**Lionel Messi has shared the story behind the viral photoshoot with Lamine Yamal's baby, calling it 'insane' and 'incredible'.**

## Context / Background
The photoshoot, which has been making rounds on social media, features Messi and the baby of Lamine Yamal, a player he will face in the World Cup final. The story behind the photoshoot has been a topic of interest, with many wondering how it came to be.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Player | Team | World Cup Appearances |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Lionel Messi | Argentina | 5 |
| Lamine Yamal | Morocco | 1 |

> 'It's incredible that we're playing in the World Cup final, and this photoshoot is just a testament to the spirit of the game.' - Lionel Messi

## What's Next?
The World Cup final is set to take place, with Messi's Argentina facing off against Lamine Yamal's Morocco. The match is expected to be a thrilling showdown between two of the world's top teams.
